content:
I am interested in developing Linux driver using Rust, may I know how could I study, and test on our existing driver gpio_pl061_rust.rs ? so I can further my development.

https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/blob/rust/drivers/gpio/gpio_pl061_rust.rs
A message was moved here from #General > ForeignOwnable borrow_mut by Alice Ryhl.
